news.title: AppLovin Stock Slides After Analyst Note On E-Commerce Ads Rollout

news.title: AppLovin Stock Tumbles 12% Amid Broader Selloff
news.summary: AppLovin is cratering 12% on Monday with no company-specific news to blame, leaving investors to wonder whether the selloff signals real trouble or just a high-beta name taking the brunt of a cooling AI trade.

news.title: Why AppLovin Is One of the Worst S&P 500 Stocks Today
news.summary: AppLovin stock was on track Monday to close lower for a fifth consecutive session as data indicate its e-commerce ad growth is slowing.

news.title: Sandisk Just Had Its Price Target More Than Doubled by This Analyst. Why the Stock Is Falling.
news.summary: Sandisk  stock has been in a bit of slump lately, but analysts are still in love with the memory storage play, perhaps even more so than ever.  The shares, which have slumped 16% to $1,915 in July through Friday, got a new $3,100 price target from Evercore ISI analyst Amit Daryanani in a note Sunday, up from $1,400.
